title: Department of New Media and Communication - Student Opinions
content:
Department of New Media and Communication - Student Opinions

“As a student of Istanbul Esenyurt University, I feel very lucky in terms of the opportunities our university provides to students. One of these opportunities is that it offers its students the opportunity to work in its own institution. I joined the team of our university by taking part in the election promotion days. When the academic year started, I continued as a partial employee in the Erasmus Coordinatorship.”

Elanur Kürkçü

“Two important factors in choosing this university were that the school offered me an environment where I could improve myself and that there were academically proficient professors in the department. It makes me feel very lucky that the teachers deal with the students one to one. There are many areas where I can improve myself. The school has a large library. Access to information is easy. We can also socialize with activities organized by university clubs.”

Sadık Ağırkan

“The communication and interest of the professors with the students at the university is way above my expectations. Academics take care of each student individually and guide them according to their abilities and demands. If studying at a university is a path to life, our professors illuminate this path. Our teachers are very good in this regard as they are related to the sector. I can have a double major program upon the advice of our instructors, and this may be the best advice given to me. I am very happy that we were able to use the opportunities offered by Istanbul Esenyurt University to the maximum level.”

Hafize Ayık

This content was updated on 15/09/2024.
